findings.message: deno.json `license` field missing (must be `MIT` for alpha)
deno.json `description` missing
version is '0.1.0'; alpha cadence requires '0.0.1-alpha.0'
deno.json `publish.include` missing — `deno publish` ships everything by default and that leaks tests/scratch
deno.json `publish.exclude` should explicitly drop `**/*_test.ts`, `tests/`, `examples/`
deno.json compilerOptions.strict must be true
deno.json `tasks` missing `publish:dry-run` shortcut
mod.ts has 49 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
mod.ts lacks section comment headers — recommended for navigability
exported function 'resetSagaRegistry' uses non-standard prefix 'reset' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'triggerJob' uses non-standard prefix 'trigger' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'triggerJobSafe' uses non-standard prefix 'trigger' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'triggerTask' uses non-standard prefix 'trigger' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'triggerTaskSafe' uses non-standard prefix 'trigger' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'resetSagaBus' uses non-standard prefix 'reset' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'continueWith' uses non-standard prefix 'continue' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'completeWith' uses non-standard prefix 'complete' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
type 'SagaTimeoutConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
type 'SagaRetryConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
type 'SagaConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
type 'SagaScalingConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
type 'SagaRetentionConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
type 'SagaGroupConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
type 'SagasConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
README missing 9/12 mandated sections (Overview, Quickstart, Mental model, API, Recipes, Configuration, Testing, Observability, Architecture, Stability, Compatibility, License)
no tests/ directory and no inline *_test.ts files — every package needs meaningful tests
package owns runtime/adapters but does not import @netscript/logger
package owns runtime/adapters but does not import @netscript/telemetry — verify spans/metrics emitted
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
